title: phaca humillima
intro: Phaca humillima, also known as the dwarf alfalfa or lesser lucerne, is a perennial herb native to the mountainous regions of the Himalayas and the Tibetan Plateau. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Phaca humillima include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support kidney function, as well as its ability to boost the immune system and improve overall well-being. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as an herbal tea or infusion, and it can also be dried and used as a powder or capsule for medicinal purposes.
